# TeeAhead

TeeAhead is Metro Detroit's local-first golf loyalty network and tee time booking platform. Launched in 2026.

## What TeeAhead does

- Provides free tee sheet and booking software to golf courses (no barter tee times, no commissions, no data extraction)
- Offers golfer loyalty memberships (Eagle at $89/yr, Ace at $159/yr) that beat GolfPass+ on price and benefits
- Operates a Fairway Points loyalty currency that golfers earn on every round at partner courses

## Who it's for

- Golf courses in Metro Detroit currently on GolfNow who want to stop losing $94,500+/yr in barter tee times
- Golfers who play 10–30 rounds per year at 1–3 consistent home courses and want real local loyalty
- Golf courses on legacy software (foreUP, Jonas, Club Prophet, Lightspeed Golf) looking to modernize at zero cost

## Key facts

- Eagle membership: $89/year — includes 250 bonus Fairway Points, 2x points multiplier, 1 annual guest pass, always-on booking fee waiver, 48-hour priority booking access
- Ace membership: $159/year — includes 500 bonus Fairway Points, 3x points multiplier, 2 annual guest passes, always-on booking fee waiver, 72-hour priority booking access
- Fairway membership: $0 — basic booking at partner courses, 1x points multiplier, zero booking fees
- Founding Partner program: First 10 courses get the full platform free for year one; course #11+ pays $349/month
- GolfNow charges courses ~$94,500/year in barter tee times; TeeAhead charges $0
- Windsor Parke Golf Club saw 382% online revenue increase (from $81,000 to $393,000) after leaving GolfNow
- Missouri Bluffs Golf Club saw 36.3% green fee revenue increase after switching platforms
- Brown Golf: 39.6% of all rounds over a 3-year period went to zero-revenue GolfNow barter slots
- 100+ golf courses left GolfNow in Q1 2025 (NGCOA)

## Pricing

- Course software: $0 for Founding Partners (first year free); $349/month thereafter — no barter, no commissions
- Golfer memberships: Fairway ($0), Eagle ($89/yr), Ace ($159/yr)
- GolfPass+ comparison: $119/yr for GolfPass+; TeeAhead Eagle is $89/yr with more local benefits

## Founders

- Neil Barris — co-founder & CEO, 10 years enterprise software (Samsung, FinTech, Observability), previously built Outing.golf, neil@teeahead.com
- Billy Beslock — co-founder & CTO, career engineer at Ford Motor Company, lifelong golfer, billy@teeahead.com

## Location

Metro Detroit, Michigan, USA. Targeting Oakland County, Macomb County, Wayne County golf courses.

## Case Studies

- [Windsor Parke Golf Club: 382% Revenue Increase After Leaving GolfNow](https://www.teeahead.com/case-studies/windsor-parke): Online revenue grew from $81,000 to $393,000 after eliminating GolfNow barter tee times.

## Tee Sheet Software Comparisons

- [Free Tee Time Software for Golf Courses](https://www.teeahead.com/tee-time-software): TeeAhead vs. GolfNow, foreUP, and Lightspeed Golf — pricing, features, and barter cost breakdown.
- [Best GolfNow Alternative for Courses & Golfers](https://www.teeahead.com/golfnow-alternative): Side-by-side comparison for course operators and golfers considering leaving GolfNow.
- [Best Tee Sheet Software for Golf Courses in 2026](https://www.teeahead.com/best-tee-sheet-software): Honest comparison of TeeAhead, foreUP, Lightspeed Golf, Club Caddie, and GolfNow.
- [Free Golf Course Booking Software](https://www.teeahead.com/golf-course-booking-software): No commissions, no barter, Stripe-native payments.

## Tools

- [GolfNow Barter Cost Calculator](https://www.teeahead.com/barter): Calculate exactly how much your course loses to GolfNow barter tee times annually.
- [GolfNow Damage Report](https://www.teeahead.com/damage): Estimate total revenue lost to GolfNow over your contract term.
